text: Your brain has a limit—overload it, and you forget everything. This is Cognitive Load Theory. It explains how our working memory handles information. Too much info? Your brain might just shut down. Imagine trying to learn when your mind's overwhelmed. Research shows optimal learning happens when cognitive load is balanced. Less is often more. By minimizing distractions and focusing, you can boost retention. Your brain will thank you. Want to learn more about how to optimize your learning? Hit that follow button!
